name: AstraBeam120IP
comment:
IP65 beam moving head with a 120W white Laser source and CMY.
Astra Beam120IP stands as a formidable IP-rated pure beam moving head, leveraging a 120W phosphor laser source to cast intense white light. Designed for both indoor and outdoor large stage applications, its power and versatility are unmatched.
